customer_reply: Thanks for reaching out. This item is inside the 30-day return window and appears eligible for an exchange. Please reply with the preferred size and we can reserve it before the return is received.
save_path: Offer exchange first; mention size availability and keep revenue in store credit if size is unavailable.
operator_note: Clean case. No policy exception needed.

customer_reply: Thanks for the note. Because the item was worn, our team needs to confirm condition before approving a refund. If you are open to store credit, we can review that option faster once the item is inspected.
save_path: Offer store credit after inspection instead of refund.
operator_note: Ask for photo if no condition evidence exists.

customer_reply: Sorry this arrived damaged. Please send the photo if it is not already attached, and we will prepare a replacement or store credit once the damage is confirmed.
save_path: Replacement or credit; avoid asking customer to pay return shipping.

customer_reply: Thanks for contacting us. This order is outside the standard 30-day window, so we need a quick review before confirming the next step. If approved, store credit may be the fastest option.
save_path: Store credit only if approved by support lead.
operator_note: Late delivery reason may justify exception.
